name: insightshop
description: Run backend + frontend dev server for instant frontend updates (no rebuild).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n proxy,api,web -c magenta,blue,green "node dev-proxy.js" "cross-env PORT=5001 python app.py" "cd frontend && npm start"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -n proxy,web -c magenta,green "node dev-proxy.js" "cd frontend && npm start"
